allow: Bash(npm run build 2>&1 | tail -10 && npm run test:run)
Bash(npm run test:run && npm run build 2>&1 | tail -20)

Bash(git add package.json package-lock.json && git commit -m "chore: add framer-motion, playwright, axe-core dependencies")

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
fix\(a11y\): associate labels to all form inputs

Add htmlFor/id pairs to all Label+Input/Select/Checkbox elements in
saisie-rapide.tsx and edit-dialog.tsx to satisfy WCAG 1.3.1 and 4.1.2.
filtres-bar.tsx uses native <label> wrapping which is already accessible.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")

Bash(npx playwright test e2e/dashboard-filtres.spec.ts --timeout=60000 --reporter=list -- --headed=false 2>&1 | head -5 ; npx playwright show-trace test-results/dashboard-filtres-Flux-Fil-efa05-filtres-de-période-visibles-chromium/ 2>/dev/null || true)

Bash(git add e2e/a11y.spec.ts app/globals.css app/projets/page.tsx app/calendrier/page.tsx components/dashboard/DashboardFilters.tsx components/dashboard/DashboardChefProjet.tsx components/dashboard/KpiCard.tsx components/dashboard/operationnel/ProjetsASurveillerList.tsx components/projets/budget-card.tsx components/projets/progression-card.tsx components/projets/kanban-board.tsx components/activites/activites-list.tsx components/ui/status-badge.tsx components/calendrier/month-view.tsx && git status)

Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<'EOF'
test\(e2e\): axe-core a11y audit WCAG AA - zero critical/serious violations

Create e2e/a11y.spec.ts with 5 axe-core tests covering Dashboard, Projets,
Activites, Calendrier and Projet detail pages. Fix all violations found:

- color-contrast: darken --color-primary \(#2563eb→#1d4ed8\), --color-muted-foreground
  \(#64748b→#5a6a7a\), --color-destructive \(#dc2626→#b91c1c\), --color-success \(#16a34a→#15803d\)
- color-contrast: text-amber-600→text-amber-700 across DashboardChefProjet,
  ProjetsASurveillerList, progression-card, KpiCard
- color-contrast: text-emerald-600→text-emerald-700 in progression-card,
  budget-card, status-badge, activites-list, month-view
- color-contrast: text-orange-600→text-orange-700 in status-badge
- color-contrast: text-blue-500/text-emerald-500 legend labels→-700 in projets/page
- label/select-name: aria-label on date inputs and selects in DashboardFilters,
  projets/page Sort select, activites-list filter selects
- button-name: aria-label="Période précédente/suivante" on ChevronLeft/Right in calendrier
- calendrier month-view: remove opacity-40 container, use text-muted-foreground for
  out-of-month day numbers and tabIndex={-1} on out-of-month event buttons

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
